title: Count the Number of Fair Pairs

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,7,4,4,5], lower = 3, upper = 6 Output: 6 Explanation: There are 6 fair pairs: (0,3), (0,4), (0,5), (1,3), (1,4), and (1,5).
nums = [1,7,9,2,5], lower = 11, upper = 11 Output: 1 Explanation: There is a single fair pair: (2,3).
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There is a single fair pair: (2,3).
